title: Workspace Quality Entry
description: Schema for a single quality tracking record. Written by stage-05-update after each completed run. Used to compute avg_quality in REGISTRY.md.

entry_id.description: Unique ID for this quality record. Format: quality-[task_type]-[sequence]. Example: quality-prd-intake-001

task_type.description: The task_type value from REGISTRY.md this entry belongs to.

workspace_path.description: The workspace_path value from REGISTRY.md at the time of this run.

run_id.description: The run_id from the telemetry entry this quality record is derived from.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run.

quality_score.description: PASS / (PASS + FAIL) from the run's audit flags. null if the stage had no audit flags.

audit_pass_count.description: Number of PASS results in the audit checklist for this run.

audit_fail_count.description: Number of FAIL results in the audit checklist for this run.

audit_skip_count.description: Number of SKIP results in the audit checklist for this run. Excluded from quality_score calculation.

notes.description: Optional. Free-text notes explaining the quality result. Max 200 characters.
